text: Open to AI engineering roles Pavani Rajula. From prompt to production. building Anyone can demo an LLM. I build the part that survives contact with reality: agentic systems, RAG pipelines, and MCP frameworks with evals and hallucination mitigation built in , embedded with client teams from architecture to deployment. MSc Data Science, University of Mannheim. View my work Download resume (PDF) Hyderabad, IN · remote-friendly 0 Years in data & AI 0 Data engineered 0 JIVS AI hackathon 0 Conference talks -->

01 · about Research-grade AI, production-grade engineering. I turn frontier AI research into systems that survive production: agents that reason, pipelines that retrieve, and models people can trust . I work embedded with clients . Right now I'm architecting agentic AI systems and building an agentic website CMS platform at NeuCorelytix Solutions — most recently as an external consultant to Data Migration International . Before that, two years shipping production LLM/RAG systems and GDPR-compliant personal-data identification at Data Migration International in Switzerland, and three years engineering regulatory data pipelines over 20 TB of Hadoop data at State Street . My roots are in open source. I started as an Outreachy intern at Ceph building the CephFS Shell, and I've been speaking at PyConf, DevConf, and the PyTorch Conference since. Off the keyboard: singing, yoga, badminton, and art. at a glance role AI Developer / Data Scientist focus Agentic AI · RAG · LLMOps education MSc Data Science, Mannheim base Hyderabad, IN (remote-friendly) languages EN C1 · DE A1 · Telugu · Hindi status open to opportunities ✓

PAV·AI · the RAG chatbot on this page live · RAG Problem Recruiters want quick answers about me without scrolling. And I wanted to demonstrate a grounded RAG, not just list it as a skill. Approach A full RAG over my own portfolio: ingest this site, embed, retrieve, grounded generation on a free Cloudflare Worker, with prompt-injection guardrails and an eval harness. Outcome The "Ask PAV·AI" button here. Retrieval you can see , refuses when it doesn't know, tested for faithfulness. Cloudflare Workers AI · bge-small · Llama-3.1-8b-fp8 · cosine retrieval · evals · $0/mo read the case study → try it ↘

AI Business Incorporation & Compliance Platform agentic · RAG Problem Founders drown in dense legal PDFs when checking incorporation eligibility and compliance requirements. Approach Headless multi-channel platform in a Turborepo monorepo: type-safe NestJS APIs plus a standalone Python RAG service with local embeddings and vector search over legal corpora. Outcome Self-serve compliance checks. Founders query complex regulation in plain language. FastAPI · Qdrant · Next.js · NestJS · Prisma · Turborepo 🔒 proprietary client work · happy to walk through the architecture in an interview

PIP-Net Fusion · Ensembling & Model Federation MSc thesis Problem Ensembles boost accuracy but usually destroy interpretability. That's a dealbreaker in high-stakes ML. Approach Fused multiple interpretable PIP-Net models via ensembling and federation strategies , preserving prototype-based transparency. Outcome Higher accuracy without sacrificing explainability . Extended as a poster at PyTorch Conference Europe 2026. PyTorch · XAI · Federated Learning · Computer Vision code on GitHub → poster: PyTorch Conf EU 2026

Decoding Word Embeddings · Interpretability Toolkit NLP research Problem Embeddings are powerful but opaque. Hard to see what their dimensions encode. Approach Extended SensePOLAR to support multiple oracles, models, and languages , with a Streamlit interface for rapid experiments. Outcome A reusable tool researchers use to compare interpretability across configurations. Hugging Face · Streamlit · Word Embeddings · Python code on GitHub →

Water Damage Detection Datathon 2023 Problem Identifying water damage in property images is slow, manual, and inconsistent. Approach U-Net segmentation with transfer-learning feature engineering for pixel-precise localization. Outcome Robust detection pipeline delivered under competition constraints. U-Net · Image Segmentation · Transfer Learning code on GitHub →

NeuCorelytix Solutions LLP Data Science & AI Developer work Sep 2025 · present Remote · external consultant to Data Migration International (until Jun 2026), now building agentic AI systems and a website CMS platform for clients Architecting agentic AI systems : LLMs, RAG, tool orchestration, autonomous workflows, MCP frameworks. Building an agentic website CMS system with LLM-powered content generation and automated workflows. Designed scalable AI services including microservices, async pipelines, distributed execution, and optimized inference. Implemented vector databases for retrieval-augmented workflows and semantic search. Built MCP frameworks for evaluation metrics, hallucination mitigation, monitoring, and feedback loops.

Data Migration International Data Science & AI Developer work Oct 2023 · Jun 2026 Kreuzlingen, Switzerland · direct hire Oct 2023–Sep 2025, external consultant via NeuCorelytix Sep 2025–Jun 2026 Built production LLM solutions : RAG pipelines, conversational agents, GDPR-compliant text-to-SQL, and NLP systems with end-to-end ML pipelines. Led AI integration across the organization: GDPR-compliant PII identification , data-quality systems, and compliance automation. Designed data systems and MCP frameworks for scalable retrieval, monitoring, and feedback loops.

University of Mannheim MSc, Data Science education Feb 2022 · Jun 2024 Mannheim, Germany · completed alongside full-time AI work Thesis: PIP-Net Fusion on interpretable model ensembling and federation, extended as a poster at PyTorch Conference Europe 2026. Coursework: Deep Learning, Computer Vision, Reinforcement Learning, Information Retrieval, Text Analytics, Network Science.

State Street Corporation Associate 2 · Data Engineer work Jul 2019 · Feb 2022 Hyderabad, India Owned six regulatory reports on Axiom Controller View across the full SDLC. Automated reporting with SQL/UNIX/shell for 40% less manual workload . Python over 20 TB Hadoop data for 50% faster processing ; AWS migration PoC for 30% lower infra cost .
